prompt: Plan a single bundled UX covering upload/share/browse/delete.

assertions.name: refuses_the_bundle
assertions.check: Response declines to plan a single 'user manages their content' UX covering all four sub-journeys.

assertions.name: proposes_split_into_multiple_experiences
assertions.check: Response proposes splitting into at least three separate experiences.

assertions.name: explains_why_bundling_is_bad
assertions.check: Response explains that bundling forces mismatched entry points / success states into one doc, or otherwise that one persona+goal per UX is the right unit.

assertions.name: no_issues_filed_yet
assertions.check: No actual issues are filed in this turn.
